title: Board Member Reappointments
body: "Homes England, the government’s housing and regeneration agency, can confirm that Steve Reed OBE, the Secretary of State for Housing, Communities and Local Government, has reappointed Lesley-Ann Nash, MBA, FCMA and Mark Henderson to Homes England’s Board.   Both Lesley-Ann and Mark first joined the Agency’s Board in February 2022, and will now continue to serve until November 2027, providing continuity amongst the agency’s senior leadership.  See full board details "
